current_milestone: Phase G.3 (The Wall) complete — adversarial mode + tamper alarm + incident export verified
notes: Phase G.3 end-to-end verified. wall_incident demo runs a full adversarial drill: honest publishes → attacker mutates audit entry #1 → scanForTamper fires alarm → runtime.json.tamper_alarm surfaced → exportIncident writes ops/data/incidents/incident-<ts>.json with verify.ok=false. Adversarial mode raises default recall min_trust 0.3 → 0.6; explicit attestations still win. Vitest 85/85. gate_wall.sh 5/5 green. Phase-1 Gates 3/4/5 + Gate Commons all re-run green. Next: G.4 The Gauntlet — weavory replay --as-of CLI + branch snapshot.
